texto: Public officials insult our intelligence and our goodwill when they paint rosy pictures about budgets, jobs, bipartisanship, and transparency, and alter their positions on issues simply to keep collecting their paycheck by never disagreeing or disappointing anyone.
explicacao: Citação de Wendy E. Long sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Public officials insult our intelligence and our goodwill when they paint rosy pictures about bud…” articula inteligencia, transparency, paint em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como paint.
